2606.31947.title: LuxEmo: Expressive Text-to-Speech Corpus for Luxembourgish
2606.31947.paper_summary: State-of-the-art speech datasets predominantly focus on widely spoken languages, often overlooking low-resource languages such as Luxembourgish, which remain underrepresented in speech technology research. In this work, we introduce LuxEmo, a 21-hour conversational expressive speech corpus for Luxembourgish with 4 emotion categories. LuxEmo is derived from Radio Télévision Luxembourg (RTL) youth broadcasts, using automated detection followed by human validation. We propose a semi-automatic curation workflow combining voice activity detection, denoising, language identification, LuxASR-based segmentation, automatic emotion prediction, lexical cues, and targeted human review. Additionally, we benchmark five expressive TTS systems covering German-based cross-lingual transfer, multilingual Luxembourgish support, Luxembourgish adaptation, and non-parametric prosody transfer. Performance is evaluated using both objective metrics and human evaluation.
2606.31947.paper_summary_zh: 最先進的語音數據集主要集中在廣泛使用的語言上，經常忽視像盧森堡語這樣的低資源語言，這些語言在語音技術研究中仍然代表性不足。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們介紹了LuxEmo，一個包含21小時對話性表達語音的盧森堡語語料庫，涵蓋4個情感類別。<lb/>LuxEmo源自盧森堡廣播電視台（RTL）的青年廣播，使用自動檢測後經過人工驗證。<lb/>我們提出了一個半自動的策展工作流程，結合了語音活動檢測、去噪、語言識別、基於LuxASR的分段、自動情感預測、詞彙提示和針對性的人工審查。<lb/>此外，我們基準測試了五個表達性TTS系統，涵蓋德語基於跨語言轉移、多語言盧森堡語支持、盧森堡語適應和非參數韻律轉移。<lb/>性能評估使用了客觀指標和人工評估。
2606.31947.author: Nina Hosseini-Kivanani et.al.
